zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus於1450年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock25歲，母親Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood20歲。她於1468年3月4日與Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年2月21日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可享年47歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林聖 尼尼安也斯 笛卡爾 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus于1450年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock25岁，母亲Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood20岁。她于1468年3月4日与Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年2月21日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可享年47岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林聖 尼尼安也斯 笛卡爾 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus was born in 1450, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock, was 25 and her mother, Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood, was 20. She married Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus on 4 March 1468. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 21 February 1497, in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 47, and was buried in St Ninian's Old Churchyard, Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus est née en 1450, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus le 4 mars 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 février 1497, à North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à St Ninian's Old Churchyard, Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat am 4. März 1468 Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. ko.Saint Ninians Old Churchyard, Saint Nini: 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링 스트 니니누'스 드 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus(이)가 1450년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1468년 3월 4일 Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 2월 21일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 노르스 버윅에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링 스트 니니누'스 드 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Ninians Old Churchyard, Saint Nini: ст нинян'с олд чурчярд, стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus родилась в 1450 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus 4 марта 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 февраля 1497 г. в местности норт бирвикк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности ст нинян'с олд чурчярд, стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
